title: Level 1: First Date
introNarration: tonight you are driving to meet your date for the first time
your phone keeps lighting up and you cannot look away for long
everything feels bright and a little fragile

title: Level 2: Marriage
introNarration: years in you are still learning how to fight fair in a small space
today the messages are about time and who shows up
every line lands heavier because you already know each other too well

title: Level 3: Hospital
introNarration: you are on the way to the hospital again
the texts are short because there is not much room left for small talk
you type without looking and hope the words still reach her
